blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 54°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 30°F.
